hero.subtitle: I'm **Santiago Romero** — Full Stack Developer. I design and develop modern web applications that don't just work, they scale. From backend to frontend, from prototype to production.

about.label: ABOUT ME
about.p1: I'm Santiago Romero, a Full Stack Developer from Bucaramanga, Colombia. I am driven by the belief that well-written code can transform businesses and simplify lives.
about.p2: I work with the full stack — frontend, backend, and databases — because understanding the entire system is what allows me to make better decisions. I don't just want things to work; I want them to be well-built.
about.p3: When I'm not coding, I'm learning something new. There's always a technology to explore, a problem to solve, or a project to improve.

principles.clean_code: Clean Code — I write code that anyone can understand
principles.performance: Performance — Fast, smooth, and efficient applications
principles.ui_ux: UI/UX Design — Intuitive interfaces that enhance the experience
principles.continuous_learning: Continuous learning — Constantly evolving as a developer

about.open_to: Open to freelance projects, collaborations and hybrid or remote opportunities.

skills.label: TECH STACK
skills.subtitle: A modern full-stack toolkit to build complete applications, from idea to production.
skills.learning_desc: Always learning and exploring new technologies. Have a project that requires something specific?

projects.label: CASE STUDIES
projects.subtitle: Real systems built with focus on functionality, usability and value.

velvet.title: Velvet & Co — Web Store
velvet.description: Responsive web application built with HTML, CSS and vanilla JavaScript that consumes data from a public product API. Features dynamic catalog display with search, filtering, sorting and a shopping cart with localStorage persistence. Its modern and adaptive design offers a smooth and intuitive user experience on any device.
features: Dynamic DOM rendering and API integration

gym.title: GymMaster CLI — Gym Management System
gym.description: GymMaster CLI is a complete gym management system built with Node.js, native MongoDB driver and Inquirer.js. This project demonstrates the implementation of atomic transactions, aggregation framework queries and robust architecture. Complete CRUD system for clients, training plans, progress tracking, nutrition, contracts and payments.
features: Complete CRUD for clients, plans, progress, nutrition and contracts
Console data management through interactive CLI interface
Secure operations with transactions and advanced validations

dataflix.title: DataFlix — Database Educational Platform
dataflix.description: DataFlix is an educational web platform designed for anyone to learn databases from scratch. The site offers free courses, interactive quizzes, progress tracking and a personalized user profile. The goal is to democratize access to database knowledge, encouraging autonomous and practical learning through a modern, visual and responsive experience.

pizza.title: Pizza y Punto — Elite Management System
pizza.description: Pizza y Punto is a complete management system for pizzerias built with Node.js, Native MongoDB Driver and Inquirer.js. This project demonstrates the implementation of atomic transactions, Aggregation Framework queries and robust architecture. Complete CRUD system, inventory control, automatic delivery driver assignment and sales analysis, all in an enterprise-level interactive CLI application.
features: Manage orders, clients, inventory and drivers from an intuitive CLI interface
Implements atomic transactions and advanced queries with the Aggregation Framework
Real-time sales reports and metrics to optimize decision-making
